untranslatable_reason: Signal requires: (1) detection of 'futures down before market open' — no futures data in allowed indicators; (2) ranking stocks by 'lowest returns from previous day's lows' — requires cross-sectional ranking logic not expressible in single-stock condition format; (3) intraday mean reversion detection — not directly available without intraday bar data; (4) market close liquidation — 'market_close' is not an allowed regime value
translation_notes: Translated available components: close > sma_20 (price above 20-day MA) and returns < 0 (panic selling proxy). Cannot express: futures pre-market condition, cross-sectional ranking of 10 lowest stocks, intraday reversion mechanics, or strict market-close exit timing in current rule engine constraints.
